# Snowflake Dynamic Table — Refresh Asset

Materializes by calling `ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE <db>.<schema>.<name> REFRESH` on a named existing Snowflake dynamic table. Pulls scheduling state + last-refresh-status into materialization metadata.

Single-entity counterpart to the auto-discovered dynamic-table assets in `snowflake_workspace`.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `asset_key` | `str` | Dagster asset key (e.g. 'snowflake/dt/customer_summary'). |
| `dynamic_table_name` | `str` | Name of the dynamic table. |
| `database` | `str` | Snowflake database holding the DT. |
| `schema` | `str` | Snowflake schema holding the DT. |
| `account_env_var` | `str` | Env var with Snowflake account. |
| `user_env_var` | `str` | Env var with Snowflake username. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `password_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with Snowflake password. |
| `warehouse_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with Snowflake warehouse. |
| `role_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with Snowflake role. |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `group_name` | `str` | `"snowflake"` | Dagster asset group name. |
| `description` | `str` | — | Asset description. |
| `owners` | `List[str]` | — | Asset owners. |
| `asset_tags` | `Dict[str, str]` | — | Catalog tags. |
| `kinds` | `List[str]` | — | Asset kinds (auto-includes 'snowflake'). |
| `deps` | `List[str]` | — | Upstream Dagster asset keys. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `pat_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with Snowflake PAT. |
| `private_key_path_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with RSA private key path. |
| `private_key_passphrase_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with private-key passphrase. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.SnowflakeDynamicTableRefreshAssetComponent
attributes:
  asset_key: snowflake/dt/customer_summary
  dynamic_table_name: CUSTOMER_SUMMARY
  database: DAGSTER_DEMO
  schema: ANALYTICS
  account_env_var: SNOWFLAKE_ACCOUNT
  user_env_var: SNOWFLAKE_USER
  password_env_var: SNOWFLAKE_PASSWORD
```

## Materialization metadata

| Key | Description |
|---|---|
| `dynamic_table_fqn` | `<db>.<schema>.<name>` |
| `scheduling_state` | RUNNING / SUSPENDED / SUSPENDED_ON_ERROR |
| `last_refresh_status` | SUCCESS / FAILED / CANCELED |
| `target_lag` | Configured lag target |
| `refresh_mode` | AUTO / FULL / INCREMENTAL |
| `last_successful_refresh_time` | ISO timestamp |

## Auth options

Same as `snowflake_task_execute_asset` — password / PAT / keypair.

## Requirements

```
snowflake-connector-python>=3.0.0
```
